ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the developer (e.g., Google, Microsoft) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the developer joined the company */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date the developer was active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "github_link" TEXT /* GitHub link for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the repository belongs to */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit */,
  "branch_count" INTEGER /* Number of branches in the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "merge_commit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the commit is a merge commit */,
  "code_quality_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the quality of the commit */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the commit (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_files" (
  "commit_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file affected by a commit */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file within the repository */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the commit */,
  "lines_changed" INTEGER /* Number of lines changed in the commit */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .py, .java, .md) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being accessed */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the repository */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, clone, push) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the developer is assigned to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the project */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the developer for the project */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the developer was assigned to the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the developer's assignment to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
